goal: Review AHP examples for contract completeness.
constraints: Focus on missing required fields and unclear return contracts.
Do not rewrite examples unless a validation issue requires it.
acceptance: Every example has goal, constraints, acceptance, failure_boundary, and return_required.
Reviewer reports any ambiguity as a blocker.
failure_boundary: Stop before changing public positioning or protocol claims.
human_brief: Review the packet examples and confirm the v0.1 contract is present.
